title: Just Some More Doggos
description: This pack adds more beautiful types of doggos to tame!
body:
![Just Some More Doggos Logo](https://i.imgur.com/TpgjtVL.png)
**WARNING! YOU MUST USE OPTIFINE FOR THIS TO WORK! IF YOU'RE ON FABRIC, [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) AND [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) WORK JUST AS WELL**

This pack adds more beautiful types of doggos to tame! This packs' randomized wolf textures bring more life into your world!

>Dogs should stay the same texture throughout versions if you are planning on upgrading your world, HOWEVER with new pack updates usually come new doggos, and this means you most likely won't have the same type of dog you had before! You can get around this in 2 ways, either don't update your pack, or update the pack and look for the same doggo in your world!


```

```


### HOW TO USE

Download the pack.

Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder. *(Unzipping is optional.)*

Open your Minecraft Launcher and launch your version of [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home).

It's now ready to be used!

 

 

*<sub>This pack was originally posted on my [PMC](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/just-some-more-doggos-pack/), go check it out!</sub>*
